Access
🗺 Google Maps

Step 1–2: Exit the ticket gate at JR Otsuka Station and turn right to the South Exit.

Step 3–4: Go straight after exiting from the South Exit. Turn right in front of the shopping street.

Step 5–6: Follow the path after turning right. Keep going straight.

Step 7–8: Keep going straight. You are almost there!

Step 9–10: The brown building is Region Otsuka! The entrance is here — the mailbox keybox is at the entrance.
